query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pending_tasks,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(ai.requestId, '-', at2.stageId)) as unique_request_stages
FROM approvalTasks at2
JOIN approvalInstances ai ON at2.instanceId = ai.id
WHERE at2.status = 'pending'
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pending_tasks,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(ai.requestId, '-', at2.stageId)) as unique_request_stages
FROM approvalTasks at2
JOIN approvalInstances ai ON at2.instanceId = ai.id
WHERE at2.status = 'pending'
